title: Mosquito Elytra
description: Replaces elytra loop sound with the sounds of a mosquito.
body:
Replaces elytra loop sound with the sounds of a mosquito. Sloppily made in like half an hour in the morning before work because I was inspired by a post with a meme in one Minecraft-themed Telegram channel which said "haha, i require a mod which adds mosquito sound when flying on elytra 😭".

Video showcase:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fF8qE-2Od8M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
